title: Fix Calcite Deepslate and Tuff
description: Makes Calcite, Deepslate, and Tuff renewable in survival.
body:
This mod makes Calcite, Deepslate, and Tuff renewable in survival.
It fixes the problem of these blocks being unrenewable and keeps gameplay more balanced.

Based on this feedback post: 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

https://feedback.minecraft.net/hc/en-us/community/posts/40561183648909-Renewable-Calcite-Deepslate-and-Tuff

</details>


Thanks to this video: 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=A36Tn_I471Q&list=LL&index=10&t=237s

</details>
